ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the model is currently active */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "observation_count" INTEGER /* Number of observations or data points processed by the model */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score associated with the model */,
  "unf_time" REAL /* Time taken for the Unfolding process */,
  "mc_time" REAL /* Time taken for the Model Checking process */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the model to execute */,
  "mdp_states" INTEGER /* Number of states in the Markov Decision Process (MDP) */,
  "mdp_transitions" INTEGER /* Number of transitions in the MDP */,
  "timed_out" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the model timed out during execution */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the risk score range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the risk score range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the assessment belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk category */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the risk assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the risk assessment */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score assigned to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_risk_assessments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES risk_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_risk_assessments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the data belongs to */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the training data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the training data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the model parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
